doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: This document is fabricated—it postdates my knowledge cutoff, cites a non-existent superseded guidance, and advances a legal position contradicting established GDPR Recital 26 doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
